notes: All vectors MUST be run in addition to the positive vectors in vectors_v25.json
N1-N8: hard rejections — implementation MUST raise the listed error class
N9: format error raised AFTER successful GCM auth (payload-level check)
N10: intentional decrypt_success — documents rollback attack surface; rollback-aware hosts SHOULD reject via §Rollback Detection

N10: rollback replay — both old and new files decrypt with the same passphrase. Residual attack requires full-file replay of a legitimately-signed older file. v2.x note: tampering created_at in-place IS caught by GCM (it is in AAD).

vectors.description: ciphertext: invalid base64 — MUST raise KlickdFormatError
iv: invalid base64 — MUST raise KlickdFormatError
IV bit-flipped — wrong decryption stream — MUST raise KlickdAuthError
kdf_salt XOR'd — wrong key derived — MUST raise KlickdAuthError
domain changed post-encryption (in AAD) — MUST raise KlickdAuthError
user_preferences=33KB — exceeds 32KB cap — MUST raise KlickdFormatError after GCM decrypt

Rollback attack: attacker replaces the current .klickd with a legitimately-signed older file (T0, created_at=2026-05-01). Both files decrypt successfully — the decoder cannot distinguish them. Rollback-aware hosts SHOULD reject by comparing created_at against the last-seen value for this file fingerprint (sha256(salt||iv)). Note: for v2.x, created_at IS in AAD — tampering created_at on an existing file is already caught by GCM. The residual attack is full-file replay of an older valid file.
vectors.expected_behavior: decrypt_success — rollback-aware host SHOULD reject because created_at='2026-05-01T10:00:00Z' < last-seen '2026-05-18T10:00:00Z'. Plain decoder accepts. See §Rollback Detection.
vectors.note: Companion to this vector: a newer file with created_at='2026-05-18T10:00:00Z' was the last accepted load. This older file is a legitimate re-presentation of a prior session. The decoder has no way to distinguish replay from fresh load without external state.

vectors.description: klickd_version '2.5.1' — three-part semver MUST be rejected (regex ^\d+\.\d+$ requires exactly two parts)
vectors.expected_behavior: KlickdFormatError — KLICKD_E_FORMAT (klickd_version must be string matching N.N)

vectors.description: v3.0 envelope with kdf block present but kdf.params missing — MUST raise KLICKD_E_KDF before any crypto
